name: comments
description: Threaded comments anchored to a polymorphic TargetRef. Kitab v0.2.0 portable surface (renderless core + props-driven hook); Convex-backed Nosion wiring isolated under adapters/.
notes: Portable surface: types/, lib/CommentsContext.tsx, hooks/useCommentsCore.ts, components/{CommentsAnchor,CommentsThread,ThreadPopover,CommentItem,CommentComposer}.tsx. Consumer-only: adapters/{nosion,nosionStandalone,PageCommentsPanel}. The shared lib/store + Convex _generated deps are consumed only by adapter files and never by the portable surface.
